title: eulophia ochreata
intro: Eulophia ochreata, also known as the Yellow-leaved Eulophia, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Eulophia ochreata include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and roots are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions.
